record.field: Deteremines the policy for computin the risk assessment from the set of plan Values: avg: use the average max: use the maximum. Default
select count(id) from res_partner where bvn is null
select count(id) from res_partner where is_pep is true
Human Health And Social Work Act.
Customer Engaged In Human Trafficking in the North
Assessing the risks associated with onboarding customers associated with human trafficking in the North East and its impact on the bank
Put customers on PND, Carry out EDD
Default Risk Assessment At Customer Onboarding
Act. Of Extraterritor. Org N Bodies
Human Health And Social Work Act.
Water Sup Sewag Wast Mgt N Rem Act
Jaac - State Joint Local Govt Acct
Special Public Works Program Of Fgn
Platinum Premium Business Account Variant 1 Fn
Savings Dom For Imto Receivers Re And Diaspora
select risk_score from res_partner where id=%s and bvn is null
Customers without BVN are high risk
select risk_score from res_partner where id=%s and mobile is null and phone is null
Customers without mobile phone are medium risk
select risk_score from res_partner where id=%s and is_blacklist=true
Customers on blacklist are significantly high risk
select risk_score from res_partner where id=%s and is_pep=true
Customers on PEPlist are significantly high risk
select select risk_score from res_partner where id=%s and is_watchlist=true
Customers on Watchlist are significantly high risk
select risk_rating from res_risk_assessment where is_default=true limit 1
